name: Cordless Angle Grinder
shortDescription: Battery-powered angle grinder for cutting and finishing installation work.
longDescription: A cordless angle grinder for on-site cutting, deburring and finishing during hydrant pipework, bracket and signage installation, where a mains lead isn't practical. Supplied with a guard, spanner and one 4.5-inch cutting disc; battery and charger sold separately or as a kit.

images.alt: Cordless Angle Grinder supplied by Expert Safety Solutions, Vadodara
